commit_scope: After the C-emit lane, make the x86-64 asm-emit independent of clang. The arm64 form-asm/form-lower lane already emits machine bytes with no clang; the x64 (Windows/Intel) lane had only form-pe-coff (wraps caller bytes) + hand-encoded recipes + the affine lea -- no general LOWERING. Adds form-asm-x64.fk (x64 instruction byte encoders) and form-lower-x64.fk (the x64 twin of form-lower: an op-tagged expression tree -> single-accumulator RAX codegen, arg banked in RCX, operand-aware fold + re-entrant push/pop spill), so an arbitrary LIT/ARG/ADD/SUB/MUL tree compiles to x64 machine bytes with zero clang. Proven four-way and by execution.

roles: direction: after the C-emit, the asm-emit must be independent of C (clang)

evidence_refs: form-asm-x64.fk -> x86-64 byte encoders verified against the clang/llvm-objdump oracle per instruction: mov rax,rcx (48 89 C8), mov rax,imm32 (48 C7 C0 ..), add/sub rax,imm32 (48 05 / 48 2D), imul rax,rax,imm32 (48 69 C0 ..), add/sub/imul rax,rcx (48 01/29 C8, 48 0F AF C1), push rax (50) / pop rdx (5A), ret (C3)

Git Bash + Windows toolchain: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/form-asm-x64.fk form-stdlib/form-lower-x64.fk form-stdlib/tests/form-lower-x64-band.fk -> 15; fourth arm: 1 band(s) four-way; 1 ok, 0 divergent

EXECUTION conviction (the deepest witness, per form-to-asm.form): powershell -File scripts/x64_lower_run.ps1 -> status pass. Five trees lower -> form-pe-coff object -> lld-link DLL -> bootstrap host RUN: 3n+7@5=22, 3n+7@100=307, n*n+n@9=90, (n+n)*n@5=50, n*n-3@6=33. The recipe machine code is 100% Form-emitted; clang/gcc never touch it (gcc builds only the host exe; lld-link is the linker carrier).

commands: Git Bash: export PATH="$PATH:/c/Program Files/LLVM/bin"; cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/form-asm-x64.fk form-stdlib/form-lower-x64.fk form-stdlib/tests/form-lower-x64-band.fk
fourth_arm_outputs: form-lower-x64 fkc lane: fourth arm: 1 band(s) four-way (fkwu + pre-flattened tables); 1 ok, 0 divergent; verdict 15

deploy_validation.notes: Additive Form recipes + a Windows execution proof; no existing file's behavior changed.

phase_gate.reason: The x64 lowering for the arithmetic subset is clang-free and execution-proven; branches (cmp+jcc) and CALL/recursion (the x64 twin of form-lower's COND/bl) plus general register allocation are the named next increments toward parity with the arm64 lane.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: The Windows/x86-64 native lane gains a general expression-tree compiler that emits machine bytes with no clang -- the x64 twin of the arm64 form-asm/form-lower lane. A Form recipe over LIT/ARG/ADD/SUB/MUL now becomes a running native DLL with clang nowhere in the code path.
public_endpoints: local-only: Form stdlib x64 encoder/lowering, a four-way band, and a Windows execution proof
test_flows: Four-way: form-lower-x64-band -> 15 (Go/Rust/TS/fkwu, 0 divergent) -- the lowering byte-encodes identically across kernels.
Execution: five trees (incl. non-affine n*n+n, (n+n)*n, n*n-3) lower -> PE/COFF -> DLL -> bootstrap host run with byte-correct results, zero clang in the code path.
